meta_title: Website for Tutor — Create in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a tutor website with AI in 5 minutes. Show subjects, experience, reviews. Attract students without code. Try Promto free.
og_description: AI will create a tutor website in 5 minutes: subjects, experience, reviews, enrollment form. No code. Try Promto.
hero_subtitle: AI will create a personal tutor website — students will find you through search and enroll in lessons.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: Your Subjects & Experience
advantages.description: List subjects, grades, lesson format (online/in-person), and student proficiency levels.

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe subjects and work format — AI will create a site without programming or a designer in a few minutes.

advantages.title: Professional Look
advantages.description: Personal website distinguishes a tutor among competitors on classified boards and aggregators.

advantages.title: Enrollment Form
advantages.description: Students and parents enroll in lessons directly through the site — you get an application with contacts.

advantages.title: Search Visibility
advantages.description: Site is optimized for queries like "tutor + subject + city" — students find you on Google and Yandex.

advantages.title: Easy to Update
advantages.description: Change schedule, prices, add student reviews — updates appear on the site instantly.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Services
how_it_works.description: List subjects, grades, lesson format, city, and your qualifications as a tutor.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: System generates a personal site with information about you, subjects, experience, and enrollment form.

how_it_works.title: Add Details
how_it_works.description: Upload photo, add education, certifications, student reviews — the site becomes more convincing.

how_it_works.title: Receive Students
how_it_works.description: Share the link on social media or classified boards — start receiving lesson applications.

faq.question: Can I specify exam preparation (EGE/OGE)?
faq.answer: Yes. Add a section for EGE, OGE, olympiad preparation — these are popular queries students use to search for tutors.

faq.question: Is the site suitable for a music tutor or other subjects?
faq.answer: Yes. The builder adapts to any subject: mathematics, languages, music, programming, exam preparation.

faq.question: Can I specify online and in-person format?
faq.answer: Yes. Specify lesson format — online, in-person, hybrid — and coverage area for in-person lessons.

faq.question: How will students enroll in lessons?
faq.answer: Built-in enrollment form allows students to submit an application with name, contact, and request description — you'll get a notification.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe your activity, the system creates a ready site in minutes without code.

faq.question: How much does a tutor website cost?
faq.answer: You can create a site for free. Paid plans give custom domain, analytics, and additional features.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a tutor website in 5 minutes and start receiving lesson applications.
cta_final_subtitle: AI will create a personal site with subjects and enrollment form. Free, no code.
